title: A Happy Couple and Their Travel Project
article_text: This nice couple has a happy relationship and they enjoy travel together. They always claim that every trip improves the quality of their life. The boy in this picture is their son, and he loves to draw with them. They regard their family time as a great opportunity to act together. The organization helps them plan a range of fun activities. They practice a new project every month, and the amount of work is just right. They never worry about death because they enjoy every moment. A round of applause for their nice work! Let's take a look at this beautiful picture of them. They always feel happy when they travel to a new place.

sentences.en: This nice couple has a happy relationship and they enjoy travel together.
sentences.zh: 这对好夫妻拥有幸福的关系，他们一起享受旅行。

words.eng_def: the way two people feel about each other
to go from one place to another

sentences.en: They always claim that every trip improves the quality of their life.
sentences.zh: 他们总是声称每一次旅行都改善了他们的生活质量。

words.eng_def: how good or bad something is

sentences.en: The boy in this picture is their son, and he loves to draw with them.
sentences.zh: 这张照片里的男孩是他们的儿子，他喜欢和他们一起画画。

words.eng_def: to make a picture with a pen or pencil

sentences.en: They regard their family time as a great opportunity to act together.
sentences.zh: 他们把家庭时间视为一起行动的好机会。

words.eng_def: to think of someone or something in a certain way

sentences.en: The organization helps them plan a range of fun activities.
sentences.zh: 这个组织帮助他们规划一系列有趣的活动。

words.eng_def: a group of people who work together
a number of different things of the same type

sentences.en: They practice a new project every month, and the amount of work is just right.
sentences.zh: 他们每个月练习一个新项目，工作量刚刚好。

words.eng_def: to do something again and again to become better
a piece of work with a specific goal
how much of something there is

sentences.en: They never worry about death because they enjoy every moment.
sentences.zh: 他们从不担心死亡，因为他们享受每一刻。

sentences.en: A round of applause for their nice work!
sentences.zh: 为他们的出色工作鼓掌！

words.eng_def: one part of a game or event

sentences.en: Let's take a look at this beautiful picture of them.
sentences.zh: 让我们看看这张他们美丽的照片。

sentences.en: They always feel happy when they travel to a new place.
sentences.zh: 他们旅行到一个新地方时总是感到快乐。

words.eng_def: to go from one place to another

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to say something is true'?
Which word means 'the way two people feel about each other'?
Which word means 'a chance to do something'?
Which word means 'a drawing or photograph'?
Which word means 'to make something better'?

image_prompts: A happy couple smiling and holding hands, with a suitcase nearby, ready to travel.
The same couple sitting on a sofa, pointing at a map, looking excited.
A young boy drawing at a table, with his parents watching and smiling.
A family sitting together in a living room, holding hands, with a clock showing family time.
A group of people in an office with a sign 'Travel Organization', planning activities on a board.
A calendar on a wall with the word 'Project' written on one month, and a family doing crafts.
A peaceful garden with flowers, and a couple sitting on a bench, looking calm.
People clapping hands in a circle, with a happy couple in the center.
A beautiful framed photograph of a smiling family on a wall.
A couple and a boy standing on a hill, looking at a new city below, with happy faces.
